case_title: MICHAEL SPORN VS. COUNSEL PRESS INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MUCHEAL SPORN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT COUNSEL PRESS, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ALAINE JELSVIK, SALES ATTORNEY/MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
